description: The redesign includes a simplified navigation system, improved product pages, a streamlined checkout process, and a responsive layout optimized for both desktop and mobile devices. User-centered design principles and usability testing were applied to ensure the platform meets customer needs and reduces friction during the shopping journey.

Building a high-performance admin dashboard with real-time analytics, modular React components, and a fully responsive interface using Tailwind CSS. The focus is on data visualization and seamless user experience for operations management.

Enhancing the security framework of the mobile banking app with biometric authentication, end-to-end encryption, and multi-factor authorization. This phase focuses on identifying vulnerabilities and implementing patches to ensure user data protection.
